overview: Tidewalker Clubfighter is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 75 HP, 18 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack2 Land at 190% ratio (342 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack3 Land.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack1 Land (130%), Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack2 Land (190%), Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack Water (160%), and more.

attacks.name: Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack2 Land
Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack Water
Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack3 Land
Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack1 Land

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack3 Land
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack3 Land. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Tidewalker Club Fighter Melee Attack3 Land

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
